title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Software Without a Stripe Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a Nigerian software developer stuck with a Stripe account that won't let you sell to customers in restricted countries? Do you have a Gumroad account that's been locked due to your location? Many creators face the same problem: they're unable to sell their digital products because they can't access traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. This is precisely why you need a reliable alternative – one that can help you reach a global audience without restrictions. That's why we're going to compare your real options for selling software without a Stripe account, and what you can do to get started.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling software without a Stripe account, you're not limited to just one option. PayPal, for instance, excludes certain countries from using their services, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe also restricts access to certain countries, making it difficult for creators in these regions to sell their digital products. Meanwhile, Gumroad has a blocked countries list that includes some of the world's most populous nations. That's why it's essential to explore alternative options that cater to your needs, such as the Core Shop Engine, a full backend with automated delivery and payment verification that works everywhere.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

While traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe may exclude certain countries from using their services, many of these restrictions don't necessarily mean that the creators in those countries are unable to sell their digital products. This is where alternative payment processors like NOWPayments come into play, which can help you bypass these restrictions and reach a global audience. With NOWPayments, you can sell to customers in restricted countries without worrying about being locked out due to your location.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, traditional payment processors may not always be the most cost-effective or efficient option. That's why you should consider alternative payment processors like NOWPayments, which can offer faster payment processing and lower fees compared to traditional options. Additionally, the Core Shop Engine can help you automate payment verification and delivery, reducing the risk of chargebacks and lost sales.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are crucial when it comes to selling software without a Stripe account. The Core Shop Engine, for instance, comes equipped with a bot engine that automates delivery and payment verification, making it easier for you to focus on creating and marketing your digital products. With this level of automation, you can ensure that your customers receive their purchases instantly, without any hassle or delay.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice of which option to choose depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a reliable alternative to traditional payment processors, the Core Shop Engine is an excellent choice. With its automated delivery and payment verification capabilities, you can sell to customers in restricted countries without worrying about being locked out due to your location. Meanwhile, NOWPayments can provide you with faster payment processing and lower fees compared to traditional options.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
